rule_metadata.author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community
rule_metadata.title: Always Install Elevated MSI Spawned Cmd And Powershell

rules.rule_text:
title: Always Install Elevated MSI Spawned Cmd And Powershell
id: 1e53dd56-8d83-4eb4-a43e-b790a05510aa
status: test
description: Detects Windows Installer service (msiexec.exe) spawning "cmd" or "powershell"
references:
- https://image.slidesharecdn.com/kheirkhabarovoffzonefinal-181117201458/95/hunting-for-privilege-escalation-in-windows-environment-50-638.jpg
author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community
date: 2020-10-13
modified: 2022-10-20
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1548.002
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_img:
  - Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \pwsh.exe
  - OriginalFileName:
    - Cmd.Exe
    - PowerShell.EXE
    - pwsh.dll
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|contains|all:
    - \Windows\Installer\
    - msi
    ParentImage|endswith: tmp
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
